verdict: CeraVe Face Lotion SPF 50 delivers exceptional value with ceramides, niacinamide, and hyaluronic acid combined with effective UV filters. The highest review count (4123) and 4.4★ rating confirm this is the superior choice for daily facial sun protection across skin types.

_research.name: CeraVe Face Lotion SPF 50
_research.con: Slightly heavier texture than watery formulations may feel occlusive on very oily skin.
